9: :root {

16: 
17:   --font-display: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', system-ui, sans-serif;

19:

23: }

25: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

33: }
34: 
35: .container {

44: }

52:   margin-bottom: 12px;
53: }

68:   margin: 0 auto;
69: }
70: 
71: .speaker-grid {
72:   display: grid;
73:   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
74:   gap: 24px;
75: }
76: 
77: .speaker-card {
78:   background: var(--surface);

80:   overflow: hidden;
81:   box-shadow: var(--shadow);
82:   transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), box-shadow .35s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
83:   will-change: transform;
84:   cursor: default;
85:   border: 2px solid var(--border);
86:   display: flex;
87:   flex-direction: column;
88: }
89:

94:

99:

111:

123: }

156:   overflow: hidden;
